subcodes.first_line: God willing, may you ever be and continue to be steadfast in the remembrance of Truth, and partake of the true wine which is sealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بذکر حق ذاکر باشی و از رحیق حقیقی که ختم آن بید
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
